guidance: Teach a repeatable framework or mental model a service-business owner can apply this week. Name the steps concretely. Premium and confident, never generic.
evidence_note: Grounded in Black Arrow's method and general operating logic; no invented stats.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Authority / Frameworks' was the most under-served eligible category (target 25%, recent 23%).
post_rationale: Carousels currently lead saves and depth for authority/educational B2B content, and this ships an unclaimed journey-stage mental model (5 customer-lifecycle gates) distinct from the four-system scorecard and forensic diagnostic already covered.

guidance: Feature ONE specific free tool actually published at blackarrow.ltd/tools (a calculator, an audit, an AI builder, or Black Arrow OS — the free pocket CRM). Everything on that page is free value used as a lead magnet. Lead with what the tool tells or gives the owner, cite its stated value where the site shows one, and end with the TOOLS keyword CTA. Rotate through the tools; never feature the same one twice in a row.
evidence_note: Only describe tools/offers actually published on the Black Arrow site.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Offers / Lead Magnets' was the most under-served eligible category (target 22%, recent 4%).
post_rationale: Offers/Lead Magnets was the most under-served category this cycle, and this features an unclaimed tool (the Missed Revenue Calculator) that quantifies lead leakage without relying on an invented dollar valuation.

guidance: Promote the Black Arrow platform (blackarrow.ltd/app) through its real offers: the 14-day full-access free trial (no card needed, cancel anytime) and the referral deal (refer a business, when they subscribe you both get a free month, tracked automatically). Angle it around a real pain the platform kills (tool sprawl, missed calls, slow follow-up, no revenue reporting). Lead with value, end with the TRIAL keyword CTA. Never invent features or plan pricing; point plan questions to the site.
evidence_note: Only features and offers actually published on blackarrow.ltd/app. No invented pricing or results.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Platform / Free Trial Promo' was the most under-served eligible category (target 12%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Fills the under-served Platform/Free Trial category by naming the real tool-sprawl pain the app.blackarrow.ltd feature set (unified inbox, texting, booking, reviews, reporting) directly solves, using the reach-favoring reel format for a cold-audience offer.
